title: cistus × stenophyllus var. sennenii
intro: Cistus × stenophyllus var. sennenii, also known as Rock Rose or Jara, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the Cistus genus, characterized by its white to pink flowers and fragrant foliage. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine due to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Cistus × stenophyllus var. sennenii include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and protect against infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and promote relaxation.
